evaluators.name: Python Text Classification Quickstart Config Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the Python text classification quickstart snippet after configuring it to use a mini model, exactly accuracy and F1 metrics, and max_samples=200.

evaluators.name: Batch Evaluation Curl with Project and Pagination Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the batch evaluation creation curl example after configuring it with project proj_123 and pagination parameters limit=50 and cursor='cursor_abc'.

evaluators.name: Token-based Cost Metric JSON Config Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the cost metric JSON config after increasing price_per_1k_tokens above the default while keeping currency and unit unchanged.

evaluators.name: Config Builder Text Generation Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the config builder was used to set up a text generation comparison with two candidates and one baseline, distinct model IDs, candidate temperatures nonzero and different, baseline temperature zero, max_samples=50, metrics accuracy and latency, and a config generated.

evaluators.name: JavaScript SDK runBatchEvaluation Concurrency Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the JavaScript SDK runBatchEvaluation example after setting the concurrency option to 10.

evaluators.name: BLEU Examples Gallery Third Large-Dataset Endpoint Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user filtered the examples gallery for BLEU with min dataset size ≥1000, then copied the endpoint path from the third matching example.

evaluators.name: Datasets v2 Create Endpoint Curl Example Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the docs were switched to v2 and the user copied the curl example for the v2 Create dataset endpoint using the /v2/projects/{project_id}/datasets path.

evaluators.name: Playground Weighted Accuracy vs Latency Evaluation Run Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user started a Playground evaluation run for text classification with sample size 10, accuracy and latency metrics with accuracy weighted higher than latency, and a short test name.
